headline: Trump's Iran War Tease 💥🛢️ Leaves Markets SIMPIN' 😩❓
text:
Trump 🍊👑 dropping MIXED SIGNALS 📡🤪 on US-Israel IRAN SMACKDOWN 💣🇮🇷, leaving Wall Street Cucks 🐔📉 SWEATING 😰💦 over OIL SPIKE 🛢️🚀 to $120 BARREL BOMBSHELL 💥! Day 10 of OP 🎮🔥 rattling ALLIES 😱 and SHUTTING Hormuz STRAITS 🚫🚢 like a BAD DIVORCE 💔 – shares TANKED 🌊📉 mornin', but Donnie speed-dials reporters 📱☎️: 'I GOT A PLAN FOR EVERYTHIN' 🧠💡, you'll be HAPPY AF 😍!' To CBS 📺: War 'VERY COMPLETE 🏁 pretty much' and 'FAR AHEAD OF SCHEDULE 🏃‍♂️💨' – end SOON? 'Depends, WRAPPIN' UP IN MY MIND 🧠🔒 nobody else's!' Markets RALLY 🎉📈, oil DIPS below $90 🛢️⬇️ like magic wand 🪄🍆!

But HOLD UP 🤚 – days ago screamed 'NO STOP TIL IRAN UNCONDITIONAL SURRENDER 🙌🇮🇷' now teasin' PEACE 🚫💣? Evenin' WALK-BACK 🚶‍♂️💨: 'TREMENDOUS SUCCESS RN 🥇 or GO FURTHER ⏭️ we WILL!' Close to FINISHIN' this 'EXCURSION' 🏖️😂 but if Iran threatens TANKERS 🛢️🚢, 'HIT SO HARD 💥😤 they NEVER RECOVER THAT SECTION 🌍!' Goal? CRIPPLE Iran's WEAPON GAME 🎮🚫 for US 🇺🇸, Israel 🇮🇱, allies FOREVER ⌛ – regime change VIBES 👑➡️👶 after Khamenei Jr. takeover like BAD SEQUEL 🎥🤮! Dizzying WHIPLASH 💫 in HOURS, more Qs than ANSWERS ❓❓❓!

DefSec Pete Hegseth 💪🔥 on CBS Sun: NEXT PHASE 🆙 with BIG BOOMS 💣💣 – 500lb, 1k, 2k GRAVITY BOMBS 🪂💥 on targets, 'HAVEN'T EVEN BEGUN 🐣!' Trump on contra? 'BOTH TRUE 🤷‍♂️' – 'BEGINNING OF BUILDING NEW COUNTRY 🏗️🇮🇷!' But no IRAQ-STYLE NATION-BUILD SIMPING 🙅‍♂️, he SWORE OFF that swamp 🐊!

GAS PRICES GOIN' BERSERK ⛽💸 – $3.48/gal UP 48¢ 😱, jobs TANK 92k 📉4.4% UNEMPLOYMENT 😢, labor participation 62% LOWEST since '21 🥴! Affordability TOP VOTER BEEF 🥩📊, polls HATE this IRAN JAM 🎸💥 pre-MIDTERMS 🗳️ Nov! Trump vows TEMPORARY 😌 prices DROP by polls, but GA SPECIAL ELECTION 🚨: Indie Bob 'Supported Trump but NOT THIS 💔 recession fear 😰', Nurse Angie 'Hate war 🛑, care more 'bout Iran peeps ❤️ but why US? 🤷‍♀️'

MTG's OLD DISTRICT 🔥🇨🇴 solid RED 🟥 but UNEASY AF 😬 – Dem Shawn Harris Farmer-Gen 🧑‍🌾🎖️: 'Gas ROOF 🚀 cuz WE CHOSE WAR 🫡, pickin' voters whose KIDS IN FOXHOLES 👶💥!' Trump's 'AFFORDABILITY TOUR' PA flop 🚌😩 overshadowed by Iran/Venezuela DRAMA 🌎💣 – legacy CHAD moves or POLITICAL SUICIDE 🎭❓ White House JUGGLIN' 🤹‍♂️ but petrol PAIN + unwanted war = REPUB NIGHTMARE 😈!

Mon eve BRAG 🗣️: Iran's NAVY SUNK 🚢🌊, AIR FORCE ZAPPED ✈️💥, RADARS DISABLED 📡🚫 – MISSILES & BOMBS GALORE 💣🛫! But REAL COST? ECONOMIC BLOOD 🩸💰 + Trump/GOP POLL DAMAGE 📉 pre-TERM-DEFININ' YEAR 🔮! GA voters + markets TUES JUDGEMENT DAY ⚖️📊 – Kayla Epstein SPILLIN' TEA ☕ from Peach State 🍑!
